title: Node.js Tests
content:
name: Node.js Tests
trigger: push,pull_request
language: JavaScript
source: gha-dataset
success_rate: 0.92

yaml:
name: Node.js Tests
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: ['16', '18', '20']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
          cache: npm
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm test
